message:
Fix button font-weight to match design system

Change LinkButton font-weight from 700 (Bold) to 600 (Semi Bold) per
Tenzir design system specification. Remove redundant font-weight
declarations from primary and secondary variants so they inherit from
the base rule.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
